title: Create real RepoBrief snapshot evidence for semantAH

execution.summary: Generate or reference a real Lenskit RepoBrief bundle for heimgewebe/semantAH before treating the audit as durable evidence.

acceptance.assertion: A semantAH RepoBrief bundle manifest exists or an explicit blocker records why it could not be generated.
RepoBrief snapshot check result is captured with status pass, warn, or documented failure.
The result preserves RepoBrief negative semantics and does not claim truth, completeness, runtime correctness, or repo understanding.
